Document:
# Novakin
Novakin are sapient humanoid forms composed of a single superheated gas. Each Novakin is made from oxygen, nitrogen, nitrous oxide, ammonia, carbon dioxide, or water vapor. They do not breathe, eat, drink, or possess conventional blood.
## Anatomy
A Novakin has only two organs: a Nexus that maintains consciousness and a Core that circulates and stabilizes its gaseous form. Loss of either is fatal.
## Temperature
Their normal operating temperature is [bold]373.15 K (100 C)[/bold]. Pressure-protected outerwear contains their heat and maintains this temperature. Without it, a Novakin cools rapidly, suffers Cold damage, and releases the lost heat into the surrounding atmosphere.
Novakin are immune to Heat damage and resist 60 percent of Radiation damage. Their other damage tolerances are otherwise unchanged.
## Vision
Novakin have powerful night vision but are unusually sensitive to flashes and bright light.
## Gas Reserve
Gas reserve depletion, leakage, and matching-gas inhalers are under active development. Replenishment will require the same gas selected for the character.
